title: Enable Impinj Protected Mode Request
description: Request payload for enabling TagProtect on a specific tag.

tagProtect.description: TagProtect configuration for enabling protection on a target tag.

action.description: Sets a tag to protected mode.

password.description: 8-character hexadecimal 32-bit password used for tag protection.

tagID.description: Hexadecimal tagID (EPC) of the target tag.

enableShortRange.description: Enables short-range protection mode for higher security.
